description: Registry of StackShift seeding strategies. Only ONE strategy should be active at a time — recorded in .stackshift/installed.json → seed field. Each strategy has a top-level skills/stackshift-seed-<name>/ stub folder for npx skills add discoverability, and canonical content in seeds/<file>. The stub folder name follows the convention: stackshift-seed-<id without -seeding suffix>.

tiers.required: Seeding is required for the workflow to produce a valid project state.
tiers.recommended: Seeding is a quality-of-life improvement — workflow functions without it.
tiers.optional: Project-specific or opt-in seeding for advanced scenarios.

seeds.title: Initial-Value Seeding
seeds.summary: Extracts content from HTML mockups or hardcoded components and writes realistic placeholder copy into initialValue/index.ts for Sanity Studio authors. Only one seeding strategy should be active at a time.
